ratingScale.label: Power Index
ratingScale.description: Versioned public ladder scale. Calibrated internal Elo remains the prediction source of truth.

metricDefinitions.leagueStrength: International evidence-weighted strength of the region flagship league layer.
metricDefinitions.regionPower: Average published power of the top three currently eligible flagship teams at each observed checkpoint.
